ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "total_files" INTEGER /* Total number of files in the project */,
  "total_lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Total number of lines of code in the project */,
  "analysis_time" REAL /* Total analysis time for the project */,
  "recording_time" REAL /* Total recording time for the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the result belongs to */,
  "num_files_analyzed" INTEGER /* Number of files analyzed */,
  "lines_of_code_analyzed" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code analyzed */,
  "events" INTEGER /* Number of events */,
  "trace" INTEGER /* Trace */,
  "percentage_of_lines_analyzed" REAL /* Percentage of lines analyzed */,
  "percentage_of_files_analyzed" REAL /* Percentage of files analyzed */,
  "most_likely_hypothesis" INTEGER /* Most likely hypothesis */,
  "less_likely_hypothesis" INTEGER /* Less likely hypothesis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the analysis result */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bugs found (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the bug belongs to */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result the bug was found in */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the bug */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES bug_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
